name: Mike, Team Kasich
subject: Contest Ends TONIGHT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

John Kasich's presidential campaign has a contest running that will send a winner and their guest out to Las Vegas to attend the next GOP presidential debate on Dec. 15th.

I had the opportunity to attend the recent debate in Milwaukee a few weeks ago as the winner of the last contest and it was a very memorable experience!

**The contest ends at midnight tonight, so don't miss your chance!

**
[**Make a $10 or more contribution before 11:59PM (EST) on Wednesday 12/2/15 **and you'll automatically be entered for a chance to win!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31997972:WSKrpoyYN:m:1:958431888:099724B50FF9A62B577A9BD6E3EB1AF0:r)

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31997973:WSKrpoyYN:m:1:958431888:099724B50FF9A62B577A9BD6E3EB1AF0:r)
**
This offer includes:**
• Tickets for you and 1 guest to attend the debate
• Roundtrip airfare to Las Vegas
• One-night stay at a hotel near the debate location

The winner of this contest will be notified on Thursday, December 3rd.

Thanks for your support and good luck!

**-Mike

**New Hampshire Resident
[JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31997973:WSKrpoyYN:m:1:958431888:099724B50FF9A62B577A9BD6E3EB1AF0:r)

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31997972:WSKrpoyYN:m:1:958431888:099724B50FF9A62B577A9BD6E3EB1AF0:r)

Kasich For America Contest Rules
-Contest ends December 2, 2015 at 11:59pm EST.
-Limit one entry per individual.
-A donation of $10 or more will automatically enter you in the contest.
-You can enter without making a contribution [by clicking here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31997974:WSKrpoyYN:m:1:958431888:099724B50FF9A62B577A9BD6E3EB1AF0:r).
-Entering this Promotion by making a contribution does not increase your chances or odds of winning.
-Void where prohibited.

See full terms & conditions [[here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31997975:WSKrpoyYN:m:1:958431888:099724B50FF9A62B577A9BD6E3EB1AF0:r).]

NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN THIS PROMOTION. No contribution of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances or odds of winning. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. Only individuals who are legally permitted to make contributions to Kasich For America may enter by making a contribution. Void where prohibited. This Promotion begins on Monday, November 23, 2015 at 7:00 a.m. Eastern Standard Time and ends on Tuesday, December 2, 2015 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time ("Entry Period"). All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Tuesday, December 2, 2015. The winner of this Promotion will be notified on or before December 3, 2015\. One winner will receive the following Prize: two tickets to the Republican Presidential Primary Debate in Las Vegas, Nevada on December 15, 2015; round-trip, coach tickets to Las Vegas, Nevada for the winner and one guest, with an approximate retail value of $600; and hotel accommodations for the winner and a guest, with an approximate retail value of $250. Prize may not be substituted or exchanged and is not redeemable for cash. All federal, state, and local taxes associated with the receipt or use of any prize awarded are the sole responsibility of the winner. The Sponsor of this Promotion is Kasich For America, Post Office Box 1344, Columbus, Ohio 43216.
[
](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31997976:WSKrpoyYN:m:1:958431888:099724B50FF9A62B577A9BD6E3EB1AF0:r)
Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com

You were added to the system July 18, 2015.

name: Rand Paul
subject: Are these issues hallowed ground?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative,

The American people have seen President
Obama's failed national healthcare takeover shutter hospitals,
send health insurance premiums skyrocketing and dampen job
creation.

They've seen those stomach-churning videos
where Planned Parenthood workers joke about aborting unborn
babies, dismembering them and selling off their body parts for
profit.

But despite the American people's outrage, to
the national media and Big Government politicians in BOTH
parties, these two issues are "hallowed ground."

Fellow Conservative, even as a I write you, the United
States Senate is set to take up both defunding of Planned
Parenthood and ObamaCare repeal using the Budget Reconciliation
process.

I'm going to fight with everything I have.

But I'm counting on you to stand with me.

Will you please agree to your most generous
contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 at once?

As our national debt soars toward $19
TRILLION, most Americans understand we can't keep spending like
there's no tomorrow.

I can't think of a better place to start
cutting than ObamaCare and Planned Parenthood.

By virtually every measure, President Obama's
signature healthcare law is a failure.

Recent news articles show congressional
Democrats are secretly discussing the idea of bailouts for
insurance companies who participate in ObamaCare, which would be
a jaw-dropping admission that the law isn't working.

For all the new spending, regulating and
taxing, Americans understand ObamaCare is just a bad deal.

After the shooting in Colorado this past
weekend, I know pro-abortion activists are pointing fingers at
outspoken pro-life leaders like me for my strong stand against
taxpayer funding for Planned Parenthood.

Fellow Conservative, let me be clear. The taking of
innocent life in Colorado was a tragedy.

But I don't believe for one second that means
you and I should suddenly wave the white flag for Planned
Parenthood to do its worst.

The good news is, under Budget
Reconciliation, only 51 Senate votes are needed to repeal
ObamaCare and defund Planned Parenthood!

But I'm going to need your help me get there
with your most generous contribution of $50, $25 or even $10.

Your generosity right now will show my
colleagues that you're insisting they STAND WITH RAND!

So please act right away.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

Give $10 Today >>

Give $25 Today >>

Give $50 Today >>

Give $100 Today >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Lauren Fritts
subject: Game time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
There are **less than two months** to the Iowa Caucuses and **less than 70 days** to the New Hampshire primary.

Peter, it's **_game time_**.

We cannot afford to lose sight of what our country needs in these serious times - a strong, tested leader with the experience to lead.

The primaries are approaching fast. Don't sit on the sidelines. **[Chip in $10, $20, or even $70 dollars now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45185764:6-6559LpN:m:1:1516426255:FAB100FD51785FE3ADAF12288C169A00:r)**

Lauren
**[P.S. New is great, but experience matters. Chip in now to make sure our next President is one with the experience to lead!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45185764:6-6559LpN:m:1:1516426255:FAB100FD51785FE3ADAF12288C169A00:r)**
****

****
****
****

---
| |
---|---|---
| | Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc.
---

Contributions to Chris Christie for President, Inc. are not tax deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

You can view this email in your web browser [**here**](https://echo7.bluehornet.com/p/v6-6559LpN).

P.O. Box 9119
Morristown, NJ 07963
(973) 936-9318

name: Ben Carson
subject: Hillary Clinton's foreign policy "experience"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32001436:s6obYoyNi:m:1:876315805:7D0C3CD16C6CDF1A1864334FD624CA81:r)
---

Peter,

You can easily argue that Hillary Clinton has more foreign policy "experience" than every Republican running for President -- and you can bet the media will remind us every day.

But experience does not equal judgment.

For his entire presidency, President Obama has pursued a strategy of "leading from behind" and has either underestimated or ignored the threat of Islamic radicalism.

As his Secretary of State, Hillary Clinton was the tip of the spear. She was in charge of implementing President Obama's empty rhetoric policies. And they've failed miserably.

As your Commander-in-Chief, I will speak the truth about radical Islam. I will work with our Middle Eastern allies to help the Syrian refugees resettle in the region rather than bringing tens of thousands to our shores. I will keep terrorists off the battlefield by keeping Guantanamo Bay open. I will work to eliminate ISIS quickly and decisively because they cannot be contained.

[**If you stand with me, please donate just $4 or more to my campaign now. We are in the final month of the 4th fundraising quarter, and we could really use your help today.
**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32001436:s6obYoyNi:m:1:876315805:7D0C3CD16C6CDF1A1864334FD624CA81:r)
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32001436:s6obYoyNi:m:1:876315805:7D0C3CD16C6CDF1A1864334FD624CA81:r)
---
Together, President Obama and Secretary Clinton lied about the terrorist attack on our consulate in Benghazi. They have failed to name our enemy -- radical Islam -- and have downplayed the threat it poses to Western civilization.

Sure, Secretary Clinton has experience -- but that experience is in walking away from America's responsibilities and making the world a more dangerous place.

It's time for a new direction. It's time for decisive American leadership.

**[Please stand with me right now. Become an official Q4 Donor by donating just $4 or more.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32001436:s6obYoyNi:m:1:876315805:7D0C3CD16C6CDF1A1864334FD624CA81:r)**

Thank you for your support.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32001436:s6obYoyNi:m:1:876315805:7D0C3CD16C6CDF1A1864334FD624CA81:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32001437:s6obYoyNi:m:1:876315805:7D0C3CD16C6CDF1A1864334FD624CA81:r)
---
|
---

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: BREAKING NEWS:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| | **BREAKING** : _The Washington Post_ reports an outside Super PAC plans to spend $1 MILLION against us in just the coming weeks. They are _**already**_ on the air right now. **[Urgent rapid response funds needed>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c24/70cdc2ba/47bea5c4/396739c/1852252400/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dark-money-ads?refcode=em120215_1&amount=25&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Urgent+rapid+response+funds+needed+gtgtg&utm_campaign=em120215_1&source=em120215_1")**
---

Friend,

It's started, friend. Right now, an outside Super PAC is flooding the airwaves here in Maryland with misleading ads for my opponent. For years, I've been leading the fight against dark money in politics, and here it is right on our doorstep. In July, I put forward an Elizabeth Warren-style pledge to keep dark money out of Maryland -- but my opponent refused to sign it. We can't let outside Super PACs define this election.

That's where you come in: we are on the verge of breaking a grassroots record.

We just need 35 more donors from Silver Spring to send a strong message that Maryland voters won't just sit by and let this happen.

**[Will you join us and make a donation right now? Our grassroots supporters like you are our best defense against outside Super PACs.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c24/70cdc2ba/47bea5c4/396739d/1852252400/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dark-money-ads?refcode=em120215_1&amount=25&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+join+us+and+make+a+donation+rig&utm_campaign=em120215_1&source=em120215_1")**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
**[Donate $15 right now>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c24/70cdc2ba/47bea5c4/396739a/1852252400/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dark-money-ads?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=em120215_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Donate+15+right+now+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em120215_1&source=em120215_1")**
**[Donate $35 right now>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c24/70cdc2ba/47bea5c4/396739b/1852252400/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dark-money-ads?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=em120215_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Donate+35+right+now+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em120215_1&source=em120215_1")**
**[Donate $50 right now>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c24/70cdc2ba/47bea5c4/3967398/1852252400/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dark-money-ads?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em120215_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Donate+50+right+now+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em120215_1&source=em120215_1")**
**[Donate $100 right now>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c24/70cdc2ba/47bea5c4/3967399/1852252400/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dark-money-ads?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em120215_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+Donate+100+right+now+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em120215_1&source=em120215_1")**
**[Or, donate another amount](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c24/70cdc2ba/47bea5c4/3967396/1852252400/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dark-money-ads?refcode=em120215_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=7+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em120215_1&source=em120215_1")**
As I write this email, voters in parts of our state are being inundated with these ads, supported by outside, dark money. It just isn't right. We can't allow special interests to have such an outsized influence over our elections.

**[Click here to contribute and let's show these outside Super PACs that Marylanders won't let their elections be hijacked by outside money!](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c24/70cdc2ba/47bea5c4/3967397/1852252400/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dark-money-ads?refcode=em120215_1&amount=25&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=8+-+Click+here+to+contribute+and+letrsquos+s&utm_campaign=em120215_1&source=em120215_1")**

Thanks,

Chris

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c24/70cdc2ba/47bea5c4/3967394/1852252400/VEsP/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=9+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em120215_1&source=em120215_1") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

body:
| Friend,

The world is on fire and no other candidate brings our foreign policy experience to the table.

I am confident that this contrast will be clear for all to see in the upcoming presidential debate in Las Vegas, and I want you and a friend to be my guest to see it live.

For the December 15th debate, you and a friend will be heading to Las Vegas, Nevada! Your flight, hotel and a pair of tickets are on us, and all you need to do is enter the sweepstakes to be eligible.

[](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fvegas-debate&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vegas_debate&n=1)
I want to thank you for your support and the next debate is just a couple weeks away. Act now so you can have a chance to watch history live in Las Vegas. No contribution of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances or odds of winning. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Void where prohibited. All applicable federal, state, and local laws and regulations apply. Please [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fvegas-debate&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vegas_debate&n=4) to enter by making a contribution of $20.16. Please [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/vegas_debate?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vegas_debate&n=5) to enter without making a contribution. You must complete and submit the online entry form during the contest period. This Promotion begins on Tuesday, December 1, 2015 at 6:00 p.m. Eastern Standard Time and ends on Tuesday, December 8, 2015 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time (“Entry Period”). All entries must be received by11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Tuesday, December 8, 2015. One winner will receive the following Prize: two tickets to the Republican Presidential Primary Debate in Las Vegas, Nevada on December 15, 2015; a $600 travel stipend for travel to Las Vegas, Nevada for the winner and one guest, with an approximate retail value of $600; and hotel accommodations for the winner and a guest, with an approximate retail value of $250. Prize may not be substituted or exchanged and is not redeemable for cash. All federal, state, and local taxes associated with the receipt or use of any prize awarded are the sole responsibility of the winner. The Sponsor of this Promotion is Santorum For President 2016, PO Box 247 Verona, PA 15147.
